aws.name: Systems Manager documents for security plans exist
aws.expected: SSM documents exist for system security and privacy plans
aws.remediation: Document security and privacy plans in AWS Systems Manager Documents.

azure.name: Blueprints or Policy definitions for security plans exist

azure.remediation: Document security and privacy plans using Azure Blueprints or Policy.

gcp.name: Organization policies document security requirements
gcp.expected: Organization policies exist documenting security requirements
gcp.remediation: Document security requirements using GCP Organization Policies.

aws.name: Resources tagged with architecture metadata
aws.expected: Critical resources tagged with security architecture metadata
aws.remediation: Tag resources with security architecture and design metadata.

aws.name: VPC architecture documented with flow logs
aws.expected: VPC flow logs enabled documenting network architecture
aws.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs to document network security architecture.
